description_long: This is a modern, rectangular grave monument composed primarily of polished stone, featuring a large, upright black headstone at one end with engraved inscriptions and a stylized cross. The grave is set on a broad, light gray stone base with a slightly raised central section, bordered by a darker stone trim. The headstone is sleek and glossy, with white engraved text and a cross motif, and is accompanied by a small, square accessory holder or vase on one side. The overall design is minimalist and contemporary, with clean lines and a strong contrast between the black and gray stone elements. The inscriptions on the headstone include a name, dates, and a short epitaph in Polish. The structure is solid and immovable, intended for permanent placement in a cemetery or graveyard.
description: A modern grave monument with a glossy black headstone, engraved inscriptions, and a light gray stone base with a raised central section. The design is minimalist, featuring a cross motif and a small accessory holder.
description_view_0: Front view showing the engraved black headstone with a cross, inscriptions, and the full layout of the grave's raised central section and accessory holder.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the headstone, the layered stone construction, and the depth of the grave's base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, unadorned back of the headstone and the overall rectangular shape of the grave.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the headstone, the accessory holder, and the layered stone structure.
attribute_tombstone_inscriptions: Śp Adrian Szczepaniak ur. 07.03.1993 zm. 07.12.2019 Na zawsze w naszych sercach.
